label: 第248話
source_locator: 単行本28巻 目次 p.51
summary_short: 虎杖が処刑人の剣を振るうが、日車の術式が消えて宿儺を仕留められない。宿儺は虎杖の不屈さを壊すことへ関心を向け、そこへ乙骨とリカが到着する。
summary_full: 虎杖が処刑人の剣を振るうが、日車の術式が消えて宿儺を仕留められない。宿儺は虎杖の不屈さを壊すことへ関心を向け、そこへ乙骨とリカが到着する。日車の術式消滅で剣は届かず、宿儺は虎杖が何度折られても理想を捨てないことへ苛立つ。羂索の死に伴う保険が発動し、天元との同化権限が伏黒恵＝宿儺へ移る。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: All hope seems lost when the 処刑人の剣 plan fails as 日車's life expires. 悠仁's indomitable spirit leads 宿儺 to accept 羂索 's failsafe and find the motivation to strip away that very spirit. Before the situation delves into chaos any further, 憂太 returns to the battlefield to finally confront 宿儺 himself!
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: At the last second, 宿儺 dodges out of the way of 悠仁's attack. As 日車 falls, 悠仁 watches the 処刑人の剣 lose its light and disintegrate. Not giving the boy any time to mourn, 宿儺 delivers a few strong punches to 悠仁 and kicks him away, before following up with two 解 slashes that cut him down. 憂憂 and 綺羅羅 take 日車 away. Staring at his regrown hand, 宿儺 laments that although 日車 died, the confiscated 神武解 is not returned. He also notes that 悠仁's stomach, having been shredded into bits earlier by him using 捌 , has fully healed. 宿儺 then notices 星綺羅羅 and 憂憂 nearby, with the former carrying 日車's corpse and the latter holding a large sheet. In the next instant, the two teleport away and disappear from the battlefield, taking away 日車's body. Unsurprised, 宿儺 surmises that 憂憂's teleportation 術式 was used to retrieve 五条悟 's corpse earlier. He wonders if they are transporting the bodies to 家入硝子 but finds this unlikely, as 反転術式 is less than half as effective if used on another person, and 硝子's is not as powerful as his or 悟's regardless. " The boy has acquired 反転術式 himself. " 宿儺 notices 悠仁 healing his injuries with 反転術式, having learned how to perform it in the past month. While the King of Curses should feel excited about killing 悠仁 and 乙骨憂太 , he is confused as to why he feels irritated instead. Spacing out, 宿儺 wonders if he is feeling disappointed by 日車's death, but quickly denies the notion and reaffirms his hedonistic ideology of not needing others to satisfy himself. The only purpose other people serve for 宿儺 is to amuse him until he dies, as he holds no ideals and strives for nothing more than what befits his nature. However, 宿儺 ponders why he now feels displeased when he sees others dedicated to an ideal, especially one which involves killing him, as people holding similar goals existed a thousand years ago. He then realizes that he has changed, and the root cause of that change is 悠仁. Unlike the strangers he killed a thousand years ago whose exaggerated reasons and ideals were only conveyed to him through their dying words that he did not understand, 宿儺 is deeply aware of 悠仁's unbreakable spirit, having inhabited the same body as him. The idea that someone weaker than him can rival him with nothing more than the willpower to achieve their ideals is what truly irritates 宿儺, as his capabilities freed him from pursuing goals and even made him loathe them. 宿儺 is given the authority to begin the merger. With this realization, 宿儺 chuckles and declares his intention of destroying the jujutsu sorcerers and crushing their ideals once and for all. Just then, a bright orb of light appears above his head. As a confused 日下部 and 猪野琢真 arrive on the scene, 悠仁's コガネ announces Rule fifteen of the 死滅回游 : 伏黒恵 has the authority to activate the Great Merger between 天元 and humanity. Since he incarnated through 恵's body, 宿儺 possesses the authority by proxy. 日下部 realizes that this was 羂索 's backup plan in case he died, indicating that 憂太's surprise attack succeeded. As 宿儺 swallows the glowing orb, 日下部 laments that his initial assumption of 宿儺 being better to leave alive than 羂索 due to being less likely to slaughter humankind is now proven wrong, as 宿儺 announces his plans to kill all the sorcerers present, then the rest of the 死滅回游 players, and finally the monster created from merging 天元 with mankind. The King of Curses vs. The Queen of Curses. Suddenly, the ground beneath 宿儺 collapses as 憂太 appears on the scene, apologizing for his belated arrival. 宿儺 leaps at 憂太 and channels 呪力 into his hand, but the special grade sorcerer quickly intercepts it with his katana. He tells 憂太 to put in more effort, otherwise he will kill everyone he cares about. 里香 abruptly appears and slams 宿儺 into a nearby building with her hand, angrily telling him to mind his words. Recognizing the Queen of Curses, the King of Curses smiles and greets 里香 as he defends himself from her attack.

candidate_evidence.locations_raw_text: 東京 新宿 新宿
candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 宿儺の術式 御廚子 解 解 憂憂の術式 Teleportation* 乙骨憂太の術式 里香 虎杖悠仁の術式 反転術式 術式

宿儺は虎杖の不屈さを壊すことへ関心を向け、そこへ乙骨とリカが到着する。
日車の術式消滅で剣は届かず、宿儺は虎杖が何度折られても理想を捨てないことへ苛立つ。
羂索の死に伴う保険が発動し、天元との同化権限が伏黒恵＝宿儺へ移る。
verification_notes_phase11: 集英社公式24～30巻目次・巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別資料、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した最終区間。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
